tools.name: create_local_folder
tools.title: Create Local Folder
tools.description: Creates a new folder inside the local workspace. Useful before copying files or generating projects.

parameters.folder_name: str - name of the new workspace folder

tools.name: copy_folder
tools.title: Copy Folder
tools.description: Copies an existing local folder into the workspace while preserving its complete structure.

parameters.destination_folder_name: str - destination folder name inside workspace

tools.name: copy_file
tools.title: Copy File
tools.description: Copies a single file into a folder inside the local workspace.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.title: List Workspace Folders
tools.description: Lists all folders currently available inside the local workspace.

tools.name: list_folder_contents
tools.title: List Folder Contents
tools.description: Recursively lists all files inside a workspace folder. Optionally filters by one or more file extensions. This tool should normally be used before reading files so the agent knows the exact filenames.

parameters.extensions: List[str] | str = optional file extension filter (e.g. ['.py','.md'])

tools.name: read_file
tools.title: Read File
tools.description: Reads the contents of a file from the workspace or an absolute local path. Normally the agent should first call 'list_folder_contents' to discover the exact filename before reading.

parameters.file_path: str - workspace-relative or absolute file path
